decision_point: In an adult with a complete zone II FDP flexor tendon laceration, is surgical repair or nonoperative management preferred?
clinical_vignette:
Typical adult patient for whom this decision arises (no atypical comorbidities or contraindications).

Decision: In an adult with a complete zone II FDP flexor tendon laceration, is surgical repair or nonoperative management preferred?
Options:
  1. Surgical repair
  2. Nonoperative management
label: settled
label_rationale: A divided flexor tendon will not restore active flexion without repair.
